3. Combo-space cardinality

Strategy combo-space cardinality estimate

  • Base (entry × timing × exit, no filter/risk variation): 100,000
  • Full single-pick (1 filter × 1 risk): 480,000,000
  • Plus cross-channel as alt entries: 624,000,000
  • With multi-filter stacking (2 filters): 57,600,000,000

Phase 3 target: 1B total evaluations across ~100K well-evaluated unique combos × ~100 triggers × ~100 bootstrap. Combo-space is large enough that we never need to enumerate all combinations — the loop walks the registry guided by LLM team.

5. Full archetype list

Full archetype list (520 entries) — click to expand
idtypearchetypechannelsidenovel_dimnotes
E001entryoi_overcrowded_continuation_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=15, price_5m_negOI rises sharply while price falls — pile onto liquidation cascade.
E002entryoi_overcrowded_reversal_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=15, price_5m_posOI spike during pump = late longs trapped; fade the rally.
E003entryoi_dropping_squeeze_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-10, price_5m_posOI drops while price rises = shorts capitulating, ride the squeeze.
E004entryoi_dropping_capitulation_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct<=-10, price_5m_negOI drops with price = liquidation continuation, short with the flow.
E005entryoi_funding_blowoff_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=10, funding_abs>=0.05pctOI spike + extreme funding = blow-off top, fade short.
E006entryoi_funding_divergence_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, funding_negOI rising with negative funding = real buying interest under pressure.
E007entryoi_low_vol_fakeout_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=10, volume_pct_below_p25OI rises without volume confirmation = fake breakout, fade.
E008entryoi_pump_immediate_shortOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=0Immediate fade on OI pump signal.
E009entryoi_pump_delayed_30s_shortOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=30Wait 30s for confirmation, then fade OI pump.
E010entryoi_pump_delayed_1m_shortOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=601-minute delay before fading OI pump.
E011entryoi_pump_pretrend_aligned_longOI_Pricelongpretrend_5m_pos, oi_change_pct>=8OI pump aligned with 5m uptrend = momentum continuation.
E012entryoi_pump_counter_pretrend_shortOI_Priceshortpretrend_5m_neg, oi_change_pct>=8OI pump against 5m downtrend = trap, fade short.
E013entryoi_crash_immediate_short_contOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=0, oi_change_pct<=-8Immediate continuation short on OI crash.
E014entryoi_crash_delayed_30s_longOI_Pricelongdelay_seconds=30, oi_change_pct<=-8Wait 30s post-crash for contrarian bounce long.
E015entryoi_crash_pretrend_aligned_shortOI_Priceshortpretrend_5m_neg, oi_change_pct<=-8OI crash + downtrend = strong continuation.
E016entryoi_crash_oversold_longOI_Pricelongpretrend_30m_pct<=-10, oi_change_pct<=-12Extreme oversold + OI capitulation = bounce setup.
E017entryoi_pump_high_premium_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=10, premium_bps>=20OI pump with premium spike = overheated, fade.
E018entryoi_pump_low_premium_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, premium_bps_in_-5_5OI pump with normal premium = healthy momentum.
E019entryoi_crash_high_funding_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-8, funding>=0.02pctOI crash but funding still positive = quick rebound likely.
E020entryoi_crash_negative_funding_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct<=-8, funding<=-0.05pctOI crash + deeply negative funding = liquidation cascade.
E021entryoi_pump_btc_bull_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, btc_24h_pct>=0OI pump in BTC bullish regime = ride momentum.
E022entryoi_pump_btc_bear_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, btc_24h_pct<=-1OI pump in BTC bearish regime = fade weak rally.
E023entryoi_change_diverge_taker_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=5, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55OI rising with taker buy dominance = real demand.
E024entryoi_change_diverge_taker_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=5, taker_buy_ratio_5m<=0.45OI rising but taker selling = distribution, fade.
E025entryoi_pump_low_liquidity_avoidOI_Pricebothliquidity_bucket=lowTest arch: low-liquidity OI pumps as no-trade signal (filter validation).
E026entryoi_pump_burst_3plus_shortOI_Priceshortburst_count_5m>=3, oi_change_pct>=53rd+ OI signal in 5min = exhaustion, fade short.
E027entryoi_pump_first_signal_longOI_Pricelongburst_count_5m=1, oi_change_pct>=8Only 1st OI signal in window = clean setup, ride momentum.
E028entryoi_pump_volume_confirmed_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, volume_pct_above_p75OI pump + volume confirmation = real move.
E029entryoi_pump_volume_low_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, volume_pct_below_p25OI pump without volume = thin market manipulation, fade.
E030entryoi_pump_persistent_oi_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, oi_continues_rising_60sOI keeps building post-signal = sustained interest.
E031entryoi_crash_oi_recovers_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-8, oi_recovers_within_60sOI bounces back quickly = false alarm, long the recovery.
E032entryoi_pump_top_trader_short_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, top_trader_position_ratio_decSmart money shorting into OI pump = squeeze setup, contrarian long.
E033entryoi_pump_top_trader_long_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, top_trader_position_ratio_highSmart money already long = retail FOMO, fade.
E034entryoi_pump_global_short_ratio_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, global_short_ratio_highHigh global short ratio + OI pump = squeeze, long.
E035entryoi_pump_global_long_ratio_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, global_long_ratio_extremeExtreme global long ratio + OI pump = top, fade.
E036entrypc_first_signal_immediate_longpricechangelongdelay_seconds=0, burst_count_5m=1, side_signal=pumpSingle pump signal = immediate momentum entry.
E037entrypc_first_signal_immediate_shortpricechangeshortdelay_seconds=0, burst_count_5m=1, side_signal=crashSingle crash signal = immediate continuation short.
E038entrypc_first_signal_30s_longpricechangelongdelay_seconds=30, burst_count_5m=1Wait 30s post-pump for confirmation, then long.
E039entrypc_first_signal_1m_longpricechangelongdelay_seconds=60, burst_count_5m=11-minute delay before long entry.
E040entrypc_first_signal_3m_longpricechangelongdelay_seconds=1803-minute delayed entry = slow follower.
E041entrypc_second_signal_cont_longpricechangelongburst_count_5m=2, side_signal=pump2nd same-direction pump in 5min = confirmed momentum.
E042entrypc_second_signal_cont_shortpricechangeshortburst_count_5m=2, side_signal=crash2nd same-direction crash = confirmed downside.
E043entrypc_second_signal_reversal_shortpricechangeshortburst_count_5m=2, side_change=true2nd opposite-direction signal = mean reversion likely.
E044entrypc_third_plus_overheat_shortpricechangeshortburst_count_5m>=3, side_signal=pump3rd+ pump in 5min = exhaustion, fade short.
E045entrypc_third_plus_high_vol_shortpricechangeshortburst_count_5m>=3, volume_pct_above_p903rd+ with extreme volume = blow-off climax.
E046entrypc_burst_seq_4plus_avoidpricechangebothburst_count_5m>=4Test arch: 4+ burst as no-trade signal (overcrowded).
E047entrypc_pretrend_aligned_longpricechangelongpretrend_5m_pos, side_signal=pumpPump signal aligned with 5m uptrend = momentum.
E048entrypc_pretrend_aligned_shortpricechangeshortpretrend_5m_neg, side_signal=crashCrash signal + 5m downtrend = continuation.
E049entrypc_pretrend_against_longpricechangelongpretrend_5m_pos, side_signal=crashCrash signal in uptrend = buy the dip.
E050entrypc_pretrend_against_shortpricechangeshortpretrend_5m_neg, side_signal=pumpPump signal in downtrend = sell the rally.
E051entrypc_high_liquidity_longpricechangelongliquidity_bucket=high, side_signal=pumpPump in high-liquidity symbols only = quality setup.
E052entrypc_low_liquidity_avoidpricechangebothliquidity_bucket=lowTest arch: low-liquidity pump = avoid (validation).
E053entrypc_btc_correlated_longpricechangelongbtc_correlation_30d>=0.6, side_signal=pumpPump in high BTC-correlated symbol = beta play.
E054entrypc_low_btc_correl_longpricechangelongbtc_correlation_30d<=0.3, side_signal=pumpPump in idiosyncratic symbol = real fundamental move.
E055entrypc_short_event_hold_1m_longpricechangelongfixed_hold_minutes=1Pump → 1-min fixed hold long (event-bounded).
E056entrypc_short_event_hold_3m_longpricechangelongfixed_hold_minutes=33-min fixed hold.
E057entrypc_pump_low_premium_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, premium_bps_in_-5_5Pump with normal premium = sustainable.
E058entrypc_pump_high_premium_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, premium_bps>=15Pump + premium spike = overheated, fade.
E059entrypc_crash_low_premium_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=crash, premium_bps_in_-5_5Crash with normal premium = real selling, continue short.
E060entrypc_crash_high_funding_longpricechangelongside_signal=crash, funding>=0.02pctCrash but funding positive = quick bounce setup.
E061entrypc_crash_negative_funding_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=crash, funding<=-0.05pctCrash + deeply negative funding = cascade short.
E062entrypc_pump_oi_rising_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, oi_change_5m_posPump + OI rising = real demand.
E063entrypc_pump_oi_falling_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, oi_change_5m_negPump + OI falling = short squeeze done, fade.
E064entrypc_pump_taker_buy_dominant_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.6Pump + aggressive buyers = momentum.
E065entrypc_pump_taker_sell_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m<=0.4Pump but takers selling = distribution.
E066entrypc_crash_taker_buy_longpricechangelongside_signal=crash, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.55Crash + takers buying = bottom forming.
E067entrypc_pump_btc_bull_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, btc_24h_pct>=0Pump in BTC bull day = ride beta.
E068entrypc_pump_btc_bear_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, btc_24h_pct<=-1Pump in BTC bear day = fade weakness.
E069entrypc_pump_market_cap_small_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, market_cap_bucket=smallPump in small-cap = high beta momentum.
E070entrypc_pump_market_cap_large_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, market_cap_bucket=largePump in large-cap = more reliable signal.
E071entryr6_bigmove_pump_immediate_shortReserved6shortdelay_seconds=0, side_event=pumpR6 big-move pump = immediate fade (overcooked).
E072entryr6_bigmove_pump_30s_shortReserved6shortdelay_seconds=30, side_event=pumpWait 30s, then fade R6 pump.
E073entryr6_bigmove_pump_1m_shortReserved6shortdelay_seconds=60, side_event=pump1-min delay for clearer fade entry.
E074entryr6_bigmove_crash_immediate_short_contReserved6shortdelay_seconds=0, side_event=crashR6 big crash = immediate continuation short.
E075entryr6_bigmove_crash_30s_longReserved6longdelay_seconds=30, side_event=crash30s post-crash bounce long.
E076entryr6_bigmove_crash_1m_longReserved6longdelay_seconds=60, side_event=crash1-min bounce timing.
E077entryr6_pump_btc_bull_longReserved6longside_event=pump, btc_24h_pct>=0R6 pump in BTC bull = ride momentum (counter-default).
E078entryr6_pump_btc_bear_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, btc_24h_pct<=-1R6 pump in BTC bear = fade weak.
E079entryr6_crash_oversold_longReserved6longside_event=crash, pretrend_30m_pct<=-15Extreme crash + already oversold = mean reversion long.
E080entryr6_pump_oi_confirms_longReserved6longside_event=pump, oi_change_5m_posR6 pump + OI rising = real demand.
E081entryr6_pump_oi_rejects_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, oi_change_5m_negR6 pump + OI falling = short squeeze done.
E082entryr6_pump_taker_buy_longReserved6longside_event=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.6R6 + aggressive taker buying = real.
E083entryr6_pump_low_liq_avoidReserved6bothliquidity_bucket=lowTest arch: R6 low-liq = avoid.
E084entryr6_pump_high_liq_longReserved6longliquidity_bucket=high, side_event=pumpR6 in high liq = ride momentum.
E085entryr6_pump_premium_extreme_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, premium_bps>=50R6 + extreme premium = overcooked, fade.
E086entryr6_pump_funding_extreme_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, funding_abs>=0.1pctR6 + extreme funding = blowoff.
E087entryr6_first_in_2h_longReserved6longr6_signals_in_2h=1, side_event=pumpOnly first R6 in 2h = clean setup.
E088entryr6_after_pricechange_shortReserved6shortpc_signal_within_5m_beforeR6 right after pricechange burst = exhaustion fade.
E089entryr6_after_oi_longReserved6longoi_signal_within_5m_before, side_event=pumpR6 follows OI signal = chained confirmation.
E090entryr6_short_event_hold_5mReserved6shortfixed_hold_minutes=5, side_event=pumpR6 pump → 5-min fixed hold short.
E091entrycc_pc_then_oi_5m_long*longpc_signal_then_oi_within_5m, side_signal=pumpPC pump then OI confirms in 5m = strong long.
E092entrycc_oi_then_pc_5m_long*longoi_signal_then_pc_within_5m, side_signal=pumpOI signal then PC confirms = chained pump.
E093entrycc_r6_after_burst_short*shortr6_after_pc_burst_3plusR6 right after PC burst exhaustion = fade short.
E094entrycc_oi_pc_simultaneous_long*longoi_and_pc_within_60s, side_signal=pumpOI + PC fire same minute = strong simultaneous signal.
E095entrycc_three_channel_within_5m_long*longall_three_channels_within_5m, side_signal=pumpAll 3 channels fire in 5m window = max conviction.
E096entrycc_pc_oi_diverge_short*shortpc_pump_oi_falling_within_5mPC pump but OI falls = fake breakout, short.
E097entrycc_oi_r6_align_short*shortoi_and_r6_within_5m, side_event=crashOI crash + R6 same direction = cascade short.
E098entrycc_pc_pump_no_oi_5m_short*shortpc_pump, no_oi_signal_within_5m_afterPC pump without OI confirm in 5m = fake, fade.
E099entrycc_pc_crash_no_r6_long*longpc_crash, no_r6_within_5mPC crash without R6 confirmation = noise, contrarian long.
E100entrycc_pc_then_oi_funding_align_long*longpc_then_oi_within_5m, funding_alignedChain confirmation with funding alignment = highest quality.
E101entryoi_pump_taker_buy_extreme_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.7OI pump + extreme taker buying = retail FOMO confirmed real.
E102entryoi_pump_taker_buy_extreme_short_pretrend_negOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.7, pretrend_5m_negOI + taker FOMO against downtrend = bull trap, fade.
E103entryoi_crash_basis_widening_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct<=-8, basis_wideningOI crash + basis widening = perp panic relative to spot.
E104entryoi_crash_basis_narrowing_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-8, basis_narrowingOI crash + basis narrowing = capitulation done, bounce.
E105entryoi_pump_2nd_signal_5m_shortOI_Priceshortburst_count_5m=2, oi_change_pct>=82nd OI pump in 5min = late chasers, fade.
E106entryoi_pump_3rd_plus_avoidOI_Pricebothburst_count_5m>=33rd+ OI signal = no-trade zone (overcrowded).
E107entryoi_crash_btc_correlated_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct<=-8, btc_correlation_30d>=0.6OI crash in high-BTC-correl symbol = ride beta down.
E108entryoi_crash_idiosyncratic_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-8, btc_correlation_30d<=0.3OI crash in idiosyncratic symbol = fundamental noise, contrarian.
E109entryoi_pump_high_premium_immediate_shortOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=0, oi_change_pct>=8, premium_bps>=20Immediate fade on OI + premium spike.
E110entryoi_pump_high_premium_delayed_shortOI_Priceshortdelay_seconds=60, oi_change_pct>=8, premium_bps>=201-min delay before fade on premium-confirmed OI pump.
E111entryoi_pump_funding_normalized_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, funding_in_-0.01_0.01OI pump with normal funding = sustainable momentum.
E112entryoi_pump_funding_extreme_pos_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, funding>=0.1pctOI + funding extreme positive = blowoff, fade.
E113entryoi_pump_funding_extreme_neg_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, funding<=-0.1pctOI pump despite negative funding = real conviction long.
E114entryoi_change_mfi_oversold_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct<=-8, pretrend_30m_pct<=-15OI capitulation + 30m oversold = mean reversion long.
E115entryoi_change_mfi_overbought_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, pretrend_30m_pct>=15OI pump + 30m overbought = exhaustion fade.
E116entryoi_pump_session_us_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, session=USOI pump in US session = institutional flow.
E117entryoi_pump_session_asia_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, session=AsianOI pump in Asian session = retail-driven, fade.
E118entryoi_pump_weekend_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, weekday in [Sat,Sun]OI pump on weekend = thin liquidity manipulation.
E119entryoi_pump_macro_event_avoidOI_Pricebothnear_macro_eventOI pump near Fed/CPI = avoid (unstable regime).
E120entryoi_pump_2x_avg_volume_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, volume_2x_avgOI + 2x avg volume = strong momentum.
E121entryoi_pump_5x_avg_volume_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, volume_5x_avgOI + 5x volume = climax exhaustion.
E122entryoi_pump_volume_pct_ranked_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, volume_pct_top_decileOI pump in top-decile volume hour.
E123entryoi_pump_oi_ranked_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=8, oi_pct_top_decileOI pump in top-decile OI symbol = conviction.
E124entryoi_pump_funding_ranked_shortOI_Priceshortoi_change_pct>=8, funding_pct_top_decileOI + funding in top decile = overstretched.
E125entryoi_change_imbalanced_book_longOI_Pricelongoi_change_pct>=5, book_imbalance_bid_heavyOI rising + bid-heavy book = real demand.
E126entrypc_pump_taker_buy_extreme_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.7Pump + extreme taker buying = momentum confirmed.
E127entrypc_pump_taker_buy_extreme_against_pretrend_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.7, pretrend_5m_negTaker FOMO against downtrend = bull trap.
E128entrypc_pump_basis_diverge_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, basis_wideningPump + basis widening = perp leading spot, unsustainable.
E129entrypc_pump_basis_align_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, basis_narrowingPump + basis narrowing = healthy convergence.
E130entrypc_pump_2nd_within_30s_overheated_shortpricechangeshortburst_count_5m=2, burst_density_30s=2Two pumps within 30s = blow-off, fade.
E131entrypc_pump_4th_or_more_avoidpricechangebothburst_count_5m>=44th+ signal in burst = no-trade (saturation).
E132entrypc_pump_btc_extreme_correlated_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, btc_correlation_30d>=0.8Pump in extreme-BTC-correl symbol = pure beta play.
E133entrypc_pump_btc_no_correlation_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, btc_correlation_30d<=0.1Pump in zero-correl symbol = idiosyncratic event.
E134entrypc_pump_premium_extreme_immediate_shortpricechangeshortdelay_seconds=0, side_signal=pump, premium_bps>=30Immediate fade on extreme premium pump.
E135entrypc_pump_premium_extreme_delayed_shortpricechangeshortdelay_seconds=60, side_signal=pump, premium_bps>=301-min delayed fade on premium pump.
E136entrypc_pump_funding_resetting_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, funding_just_resetPump right after funding settlement = clean slate.
E137entrypc_pump_funding_extreme_pos_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, funding>=0.1pctPump + funding extreme positive = top setup.
E138entrypc_pump_funding_extreme_neg_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, funding<=-0.1pctPump despite negative funding = strong buyers.
E139entrypc_pump_volume_5x_baseline_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, volume_5x_baselinePump with 5x baseline volume = real.
E140entrypc_pump_volume_below_baseline_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, volume_below_baselinePump on low volume = paint, fade.
E141entrypc_pump_session_us_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, session=USPump in US session.
E142entrypc_pump_session_asia_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, session=AsianPump in Asian session = retail manipulation.
E143entrypc_pump_weekend_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, weekday in [Sat,Sun]Weekend pump = thin liquidity, fade.
E144entrypc_pump_macro_event_avoidpricechangebothnear_macro_eventPump near macro event = avoid.
E145entrypc_pump_top_trader_long_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, top_trader_position_ratio_highSmart money already long during pump = retail FOMO, fade.
E146entrypc_pump_top_trader_short_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, top_trader_position_ratio_decSmart money shorting into pump = squeeze setup.
E147entrypc_pump_global_long_high_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, global_long_ratio_highPump + global long ratio extreme = top.
E148entrypc_pump_global_short_high_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, global_short_ratio_highPump + high short ratio = squeeze setup.
E149entrypc_pump_aggressive_buy_immediate_longpricechangelongside_signal=pump, aggressive_buy_5mPump + aggressive buy taker flow = momentum.
E150entrypc_pump_aggressive_sell_shortpricechangeshortside_signal=pump, aggressive_sell_5mPump but aggressive sells = distribution, fade.
E151entryr6_pump_2nd_in_2h_shortReserved6shortr6_signals_in_2h=22nd R6 in 2h = exhaustion, fade.
E152entryr6_pump_3rd_or_more_avoidReserved6bothr6_signals_in_2h>=33rd+ R6 in 2h = unstable regime, avoid.
E153entryr6_pump_taker_extreme_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, taker_buy_ratio_5m>=0.75R6 + extreme taker buy = euphoria, fade.
E154entryr6_pump_funding_extreme_pos_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, funding>=0.1pctR6 + funding extreme pos = blowoff.
E155entryr6_pump_funding_extreme_neg_longReserved6longside_event=pump, funding<=-0.1pctR6 pump despite extreme negative funding = strong long.
E156entryr6_pump_basis_diverge_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, basis_wideningR6 + basis widening = perp euphoria.
E157entryr6_pump_basis_align_longReserved6longside_event=pump, basis_narrowingR6 + basis narrowing = healthy.
E158entryr6_pump_top_trader_long_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, top_trader_position_ratio_highR6 + smart money already long = retail-driven.
E159entryr6_pump_global_long_extreme_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, global_long_ratio_extremeR6 + extreme global long = top.
E160entryr6_pump_global_short_extreme_longReserved6longside_event=pump, global_short_ratio_extremeR6 + extreme global short = squeeze long.
E161entryr6_pump_session_us_longReserved6longside_event=pump, session=USR6 in US session = institutional.
E162entryr6_pump_session_asia_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, session=AsianR6 in Asian session = retail, fade.
E163entryr6_pump_weekend_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, weekday in [Sat,Sun]R6 on weekend = thin liq.
E164entryr6_pump_macro_event_avoidReserved6bothnear_macro_eventR6 near macro event = avoid unstable.
E165entryr6_pump_pretrend_extreme_shortReserved6shortside_event=pump, pretrend_30m_pct>=20R6 pump on already-overheated symbol = fade.
E166entrycc_pc_pump_oi_pump_5m_strong_long*longpc_and_oi_pump_within_5mPC pump + OI pump within 5m = double confirmation long.
E167entrycc_pc_crash_oi_crash_5m_strong_short*shortpc_and_oi_crash_within_5mPC crash + OI crash = double confirmation short.
E168entrycc_pc_oi_misaligned_short*shortpc_pump_oi_crash_within_5mPC pump but OI crashes = fake breakout.
E169entrycc_pc_pump_then_oi_crash_3m_short*shortpc_pump_then_oi_crash_3mPC pump → OI crash 3m later = sellers using pump.
E170entrycc_oi_then_pc_30s_immediate_long*longoi_then_pc_within_30sOI signal → PC confirms in 30s = fast chain.
E171entrycc_oi_then_pc_2m_long*longoi_then_pc_within_2mOI → PC in 2min window.
E172entrycc_oi_then_pc_5m_funding_align_long*longoi_then_pc_within_5m, funding_alignedOI → PC chain + funding aligned = highest quality.
E173entrycc_three_channel_2m_strong_long*longall_three_channels_within_2mAll 3 channels in 2-min window = max conviction.
E174entrycc_three_channel_3m_strong_long*longall_three_channels_within_3mAll 3 in 3-min.
E175entrycc_three_channel_pretrend_align_long*longall_three_within_5m, pretrend_alignedTriple chain + pretrend aligned = highest weighted.
E176entrycc_pc_only_no_oi_5m_avoid*bothpc_no_oi_within_5mPC alone without OI confirm = noise, no-trade.
E177entrycc_oi_only_no_pc_5m_long*longoi_no_pc_within_5mOI alone without PC = institutional positioning, follow.
E178entrycc_r6_after_oi_pump_long*longr6_after_oi_pump_within_5mR6 follows OI pump = chained momentum long.
E179entrycc_r6_after_pc_pump_short*shortr6_after_pc_pump_within_5mR6 follows PC burst = exhaustion fade.
E180entrycc_pc_oi_taker_align_long*longpc_oi_taker_alignedPC + OI + taker flow all aligned = high conviction.
E181entrycc_pc_oi_premium_diverge_short*shortpc_oi_premium_divergePC pump + OI pump but premium against = unstable.
E182entrycc_pc_oi_funding_align_long*longpc_oi_funding_alignPC + OI + funding all aligned = quality.
E183entrycc_pc_then_oi_burst_avoid*bothpc_then_oi_in_burstPC + OI both in 5+ burst = chaos, no trade.
E184entrycc_oi_with_pc_burst_avoid*bothoi_in_pc_burstOI fires within PC burst window = saturation, avoid.
E185entrycc_three_channel_30s_window_long*longall_three_within_30sTriple chain in 30s window = explosive setup.
E186entrycc_three_channel_60s_window_long*longall_three_within_60sTriple chain in 60s.
E187entrycc_pc_oi_basis_align_long*longpc_oi_basis_alignPC + OI + basis convergence.
E188entrycc_pc_oi_basis_diverge_short*shortpc_oi_basis_divergePC + OI but basis widening = unsustainable.
E189entrycc_pc_to_r6_chain_short*shortpc_then_r6_within_5mPC then R6 within 5m = exhaustion.
E190entrycc_oi_to_r6_chain_short*shortoi_then_r6_within_5mOI then R6 within 5m = blowoff.
E191entrycc_pc_burst_3plus_then_oi_short*shortpc_burst_3plus_then_oiPC burst exhaustion + OI confirms = fade.
E192entrycc_oi_3plus_then_pc_short*shortoi_3plus_then_pcOI burst exhaustion + PC = fade.
E193entrycc_pc_oi_top_trader_align_long*longpc_oi_top_trader_alignedPC + OI + smart money aligned = top quality.
E194entrycc_pc_oi_global_short_extreme_long*longpc_oi_global_short_extremePC + OI + extreme global short = squeeze.
E195entrycc_pc_oi_global_long_extreme_short*shortpc_oi_global_long_extremePC + OI + extreme global long = top.
E196entrycc_pc_btc_align_oi_align_long*longpc_btc_align, oi_btc_alignPC + OI + BTC alignment = beta + signal.
E197entrycc_pc_btc_diverge_oi_align_short*shortpc_btc_diverge, oi_btc_alignPC against BTC + OI confirms = idiosyncratic short.
E198entrycc_pc_oi_session_us_long*longpc_oi_session=USPC + OI in US session = institutional flow.
E199entrycc_pc_oi_session_asia_short*shortpc_oi_session=AsianPC + OI in Asian session = fade retail.
E200entrycc_pc_oi_weekend_short*shortpc_oi_weekday in [Sat,Sun]PC + OI on weekend = thin manipulation.
X001exitfixed_tp1_sl1_symmetricNANAtp_pct=1, sl_pct=11:1 risk:reward symmetric exit.
X002exitfixed_tp2_sl1_aggressiveNANAtp_pct=2, sl_pct=12:1 R:R aggressive.
X003exitfixed_tp3_sl1_runnerNANAtp_pct=3, sl_pct=13:1 R:R for swing trades.
X004exitfixed_tp1_sl2_conservativeNANAtp_pct=1, sl_pct=2Tight TP, wide SL — high win rate.
X005exitfixed_tp1_5_sl1_defaultNANAtp_pct=1.5, sl_pct=11.5:1 default exit.
X006exitmulti_tp_50at1_50at2_sl1NANAtp1=1pct@50pct, tp2=2pct@50pct, sl=1pct50% off at 1R, 50% at 2R.
X007exitmulti_tp_33_33_33_at_1_2_3NANA3_equal_levels_1_2_3pctEqual thirds at 1/2/3R.
X008exitmulti_tp_25_25_50_back_loadedNANA25pct@1, 25pct@2, 50pct@3Back-loaded scale-out for runners.
X009exitmulti_tp_50at1_5_50at3_wideNANAtp1=1.5pct@50pct, tp2=3pct@50pctWide spread between TP1/TP2.
X010exitmulti_tp_first_be_runnerNANAtp1@1, rest_be_runnerTP1 then move SL to BE for rest.
X011exitladder_5_steps_pctNANA5_equal_pct_steps5 equal pct ladder.
X012exitladder_3_steps_atrNANA3_atr_based_steps3 ATR-based ladder steps.
X013exitladder_fibonacciNANAfib_levels_618_1_1618_2618Fibonacci-based exit ladder.
X014exitladder_volume_weightedNANAvol_profile_levelsExit at volume profile node.
X015exitladder_decayNANAfaster_exit_with_timeExit accelerates with hold time.
X016exitladder_tight_then_wideNANAtight_first_2_then_wide_3Tight early, wide late.
X017exittrail_atr_2NANAtrail=2*ATR2x ATR trailing stop.
X018exittrail_atr_3NANAtrail=3*ATR3x ATR trailing.
X019exittrail_pct_1NANAtrail_pct=11% trailing stop.
X020exittrail_pct_2NANAtrail_pct=22% trailing stop.
X021exittrail_chandelierNANAchandelier_3atr_22Chandelier exit (3 ATR over 22-bar high/low).
X022exitrunner_50pct_trail2atrNANAtp1=1pct@50pct, trail_rest=2atr50% off at 1R, trail rest 2x ATR.
X023exitrunner_67pct_trail3atrNANAtp1=1pct@67pct, trail_rest=3atr67% off at 1R, trail rest 3x ATR.
X024exitrunner_fixed_then_trail_pctNANAtp1=fixed_pct, rest_trail_pctFixed TP1, then % trail.
X025exitrunner_decayNANArunner_with_decayRunner with time-decay tightening.
X026exitrunner_premium_basedNANAexit_when_premium_normalizesRunner exits when premium normalizes.
X027exitbe_at_1r_then_holdNANAbe_trigger=1RMove SL to BE at 1R, then hold.
X028exitbe_at_0_5r_then_holdNANAbe_trigger=0.5REarlier BE at 0.5R.
X029exitbe_at_1r_trail_atrNANAbe_at_1R, then_trail=2atrBE at 1R, then ATR trail.
X030exitbe_at_2r_runnerNANAbe_at_2R, runnerLate BE at 2R, runner mode.
X031exitexit_on_oi_reversalNANAoi_change_dir_flipsExit when OI direction reverses.
X032exitexit_on_pc_signal_oppositeNANApc_opposite_signalExit on opposite-side PC signal.
X033exitexit_on_funding_normalizeNANAfunding_back_to_zeroExit when funding normalizes.
X034exitexit_on_premium_normalizeNANApremium_back_to_normalExit when premium back to normal.
X035exitexit_on_volume_dropNANAvolume_falls_below_50pct_entryExit when volume falls < 50% of entry.
X036exitsm_3state_proven_runnerNANAstate1_prove, state2_trail, state3_runner3-state: prove → trail → runner.
X037exitsm_2state_quick_or_persistNANAfast_tp_else_persistQuick TP if fast move, else persist.
X038exitsm_event_holdthen_assessNANAhold_to_event_then_assessHold for event window, then evaluate.
X039exitsm_pretrend_awareNANAexit_logic_varies_with_pretrendExit varies based on entry pretrend.
X040exitsm_regime_awareNANAexit_logic_varies_with_btc_regimeExit varies with BTC regime.
X041exittime_1m_hardNANAhard_stop=60sHard 1-min hold.
X042exittime_3m_hardNANAhard_stop=180s3-min hard stop.
X043exittime_5m_hardNANAhard_stop=300s5-min hard stop.
X044exittime_10m_hardNANAhard_stop=600s10-min hard stop.
X045exittime_15m_hardNANAhard_stop=900s15-min hard stop.
X046exitevent_hold_then_closeNANAhold_T0_to_T0plus_eventHold from T0 to T0+event window.
X047exitevent_hold_with_bailNANAhold_unless_2pct_againstHold but bail if >2% against.
X048exitevent_hold_runnerNANAhold_then_trailHold event window, then trail.
X049exitevent_hold_then_beNANAhold_then_be_onlyHold then BE-only.
X050exitevent_hold_2h_maxNANAmax_hold=2hExtended 2h max event hold.
X051exitfixed_tp_sl_with_be_after_breakoutNANAfixed, be_after_breakFixed TP/SL but move SL to BE after price breaks key level.
X052exitfixed_tp_sl_dynamic_by_atrNANAtp/sl_scaled_by_atrTP and SL distances scale with current ATR.
X053exitmulti_tp_with_be_lockNANAmulti_tp, be_lock_after_tp1After TP1, lock in BE for the runner.
X054exitmulti_tp_with_decayNANAmulti_tp_decayTP levels decay closer over time.
X055exitmulti_tp_with_volatility_adjustNANAvol_adj_tpTP spacing adjusts to realized volatility.
X056exitpartial_ladder_with_beNANAladder, be_after_step1Partial ladder + BE after first step.
X057exitpartial_ladder_with_runnerNANAladder, runner_after_4_stepsLadder 4 steps + runner.
X058exitpartial_ladder_with_volatilityNANAladder_vol_adjustLadder spacing scales with vol.
X059exittrailing_with_accelerationNANAtrail_acceleratingTrail tightens as profit grows.
X060exittrailing_with_decayNANAtrail_loosens_with_timeTrail loosens with hold time.
X061exitrunner_with_indicator_invalidationNANArunner, exit_on_indicatorRunner exits when indicator invalidates.
X062exitrunner_with_state_transitionNANArunner_sm_transitionRunner transitions through 3 states.
X063exitbreakeven_then_aggressive_trailNANAbe_then_tight_trailBE at 1R then 1*ATR tight trail.
X064exitbreakeven_then_indicatorNANAbe_then_exit_on_indicatorBE then exit on indicator signal.
X065exitindicator_invalidation_oi_or_premiumNANAexit_on_oi_or_premiumExit if OI reverses OR premium normalizes.
X066exitindicator_invalidation_with_time_stopNANAindicator_or_timeIndicator OR time stop, whichever first.
X067exitstate_machine_4stateNANAsm_4state4-state machine: enter→prove→trail→runner.
X068exitstate_machine_5stateNANAsm_5state5-state with explicit exhaustion state.
X069exitstate_machine_volatility_adaptiveNANAsm_vol_adaptiveState transitions depend on volatility regime.
X070exittime_stop_30sNANAhard_stop=30s30-second hard stop for ultra-short events.
X071exittime_stop_2mNANAhard_stop=120s2-min hard stop.
X072exittime_stop_45mNANAhard_stop=2700s45-min hard stop for slow developing trades.
X073exitevent_hold_then_quick_beNANAevent_then_be_onlyHold for event, then BE-only mode.
X074exitevent_hold_extended_runnerNANAevent_then_runnerHold for event, then runner mode.
X075exitadaptive_exit_pretrend_awareNANAadaptive_pretrendExit logic depends on entry pretrend strength.
X076exitadaptive_exit_regime_awareNANAadaptive_regimeExit logic depends on BTC regime.
X077exitadaptive_exit_burst_awareNANAadaptive_burstExit logic depends on burst count at entry.
X078exitadaptive_exit_funding_awareNANAadaptive_fundingExit logic depends on funding state.
X079exitexit_on_volume_spikeNANAexit_volume_spike_5xExit when volume spikes 5x baseline (climax).
X080exitexit_on_funding_flipNANAexit_funding_sign_changeExit when funding flips sign.
X081exitexit_on_premium_spikeNANAexit_premium_spikeExit when premium spikes beyond entry threshold.
X082exitexit_on_global_short_changeNANAexit_global_short_decExit when global short ratio normalizes (squeeze done).
X083exitexit_on_top_trader_changeNANAexit_top_trader_position_changeExit when smart money position changes direction.
X084exitexit_on_basis_invertNANAexit_basis_invertExit when basis inverts.
X085exitexit_on_oi_decelNANAexit_oi_decelerationExit when OI rate of change decelerates.
X086exitexit_on_burst_3rdNANAexit_on_burst_count=3Exit when 3rd burst signal triggers (saturation).
X087exitexit_pre_funding_settlementNANAexit_30s_pre_fundingExit 30s before funding settlement.
X088exitexit_pre_macro_eventNANAexit_60s_pre_macro_eventExit 60s before known macro event.
X089exitrunner_decay_to_beNANArunner_decays_to_beRunner gradually decays to BE.
X090exitrunner_with_2tp_levelsNANArunner_2_tpsRunner with 2 TP levels.
X091exitrunner_with_3tp_levelsNANArunner_3_tpsRunner with 3 TP levels.
X092exitpartial_ladder_5tp_decayNANAladder_5_tp_decay5 TPs that decay tighter over time.
X093exitmulti_tp_with_partial_runnerNANAmulti_tp_partial_runnerMulti TP + partial runner mode.
X094exitstate_machine_oi_awareNANAsm_oi_awareState machine watches OI changes for transitions.
X095exitstate_machine_pretrend_aware_v2NANAsm_pretrend_v2State machine v2 with pretrend awareness.
X096exitstate_machine_funding_awareNANAsm_funding_awareState machine watches funding for transitions.
X097exitstate_machine_premium_awareNANAsm_premium_awareState machine watches premium changes.
X098exitstate_machine_btc_regime_awareNANAsm_btc_regimeState machine adapts to BTC regime.
X099exitcomposite_exit_be_trail_indicatorNANAbe_trail_indicatorBE → trail → indicator invalidation.
X100exitcomposite_exit_be_partial_runnerNANAbe_partial_runnerBE → partial → runner composite.
F001filterfilt_liq_high_only*NAliquidity_bucket=highTop-tier liquidity only.
F002filterfilt_liq_high_mid*NAliquidity_bucket in [high,mid]Top 2 liquidity buckets.
F003filterfilt_liq_volume_5m*NAdaily_volume_usd>=5e6Daily volume > 5M USD.
F004filterfilt_liq_volume_50m*NAdaily_volume_usd>=50e6Daily volume > 50M USD.
F005filterfilt_liq_oi_10m*NAoi_usd>=10e6Open interest > 10M USD.
F006filterfilt_liq_oi_100m*NAoi_usd>=100e6Open interest > 100M USD.
F007filterfilt_liq_spread_5bps*NAspread_bps<=5Bid-ask spread < 5 bps.
F008filterfilt_liq_spread_10bps*NAspread_bps<=10Spread < 10 bps.
F009filterfilt_liq_depth_top10*NAdepth_rank<=10Symbol in top 10 by depth.
F010filterfilt_liq_age_30d*NAlisting_age_days>=30Listed > 30 days.
F011filterfilt_liq_age_90d*NAlisting_age_days>=90Listed > 90 days.
F012filterfilt_liq_excludes_meme*NAsector!=memeExclude meme sector.
F013filterfilt_micro_book_imbalance_aligned*NAbook_imbalance_alignedOrder book matches signal direction.
F014filterfilt_micro_taker_flow_aligned_5m*NAtaker_flow_5m_alignedTaker flow same direction as signal.
F015filterfilt_micro_taker_flow_against_5m*NAtaker_flow_5m_againstContrarian: taker flow against signal.
F016filterfilt_micro_recent_aggressive_buys*longaggressive_buy_5mRecent aggressive buys for long.
F017filterfilt_micro_recent_aggressive_sells*shortaggressive_sell_5mRecent aggressive sells for short.
F018filterfilt_micro_quiet_book_avoid*NAbook_too_quietSkip when book too quiet (likely fake).
F019filterfilt_micro_volatile_book_avoid*NAbook_too_volatileSkip when book too volatile.
F020filterfilt_micro_no_iceberg_recent*NAno_iceberg_5mNo recent iceberg orders detected.
F021filterfilt_micro_aggregator_active*NAcex_aggregator_activeCEX aggregators are active.
F022filterfilt_micro_low_taker_for_high_ratio*longlow_taker_for_high_ratioLow taker buy ratio for crash long (capitulation).
F023filterfilt_regime_btc_bull_only*NAbtc_24h_pct>=0Only when BTC up day.
F024filterfilt_regime_btc_bear_only*NAbtc_24h_pct<=-1Only when BTC down day.
F025filterfilt_regime_btc_neutral*NAbtc_24h_pct in [-1,1]BTC neutral days.
F026filterfilt_regime_btc_high_vol*NAbtc_atr_24h_highHigh BTC volatility.
F027filterfilt_regime_btc_low_vol*NAbtc_atr_24h_lowLow BTC volatility.
F028filterfilt_regime_eth_dominance_high*NAeth_dominance_highETH dominance high.
F029filterfilt_regime_alt_season*NAalt_season_index_highAlt-season indicator high.
F030filterfilt_regime_btc_dominance_falling*NAbtc_dom_falling_7dBTC dominance dropping (alts strong).
F031filterfilt_regime_us_session*NAsession=USUS session only.
F032filterfilt_regime_asian_session*NAsession=AsianAsian session only.
F033filterfilt_regime_european_session*NAsession=EuropeanEuropean session only.
F034filterfilt_regime_weekend_only*NAweekday in [Sat,Sun]Weekends only.
F035filterfilt_pretrend_3m_aligned_strong*NApretrend_3m_aligned_strongStrong 3m trend in signal direction.
F036filterfilt_pretrend_3m_aligned_weak*NApretrend_3m_aligned_weakMild 3m trend in direction.
F037filterfilt_pretrend_5m_aligned*NApretrend_5m_aligned5m trend aligned.
F038filterfilt_pretrend_15m_aligned*NApretrend_15m_aligned15m trend aligned.
F039filterfilt_pretrend_30m_aligned*NApretrend_30m_aligned30m trend aligned.
F040filterfilt_pretrend_2h_aligned*NApretrend_2h_aligned2h trend aligned.
F041filterfilt_pretrend_3m_neutral*NApretrend_3m_flatFlat 3m before signal.
F042filterfilt_pretrend_3m_against*NApretrend_3m_againstCounter-trend signal.
F043filterfilt_pretrend_volatility_low*NArealized_vol_30m_lowLow recent volatility.
F044filterfilt_pretrend_volatility_high*NArealized_vol_30m_highHigh recent volatility.
F045filterfilt_pretrend_oi_aligned*NAoi_trend_alignedOI trend matches direction.
F046filterfilt_pretrend_oi_against*NAoi_trend_againstOI against direction (squeeze potential).
F047filterfilt_burst_first_only*NAburst_count_5m=1Only first signal in 5min.
F048filterfilt_burst_first_two_only*NAburst_count_5m<=2Only first two signals.
F049filterfilt_burst_third_plus_avoid*NAburst_count_5m<3Skip 3rd+ signals.
F050filterfilt_burst_2plus_required*NAburst_count_5m>=2Require ≥2 signals (confirmation).
F051filterfilt_burst_window_3m*NAburst_window=3mBurst counted in 3min window.
F052filterfilt_burst_window_10m*NAburst_window=10mExtended 10-min burst window.
F053filterfilt_burst_no_burst_quiet*NAburst_count_5m=0_outside_windowExclude isolated signals (require chain context).
F054filterfilt_burst_chained_burst*NAburst_chains_within_30sBurst that chains to another within 30s.
F055filterfilt_cd_symbol_5m*NAcooldown_symbol_5m5-min symbol cooldown.
F056filterfilt_cd_symbol_15m*NAcooldown_symbol_15m15-min symbol cooldown.
F057filterfilt_cd_symbol_1h*NAcooldown_symbol_1h1-hour symbol cooldown.
F058filterfilt_cd_channel_5m*NAcooldown_channel_5m5-min channel cooldown.
F059filterfilt_cd_channel_15m*NAcooldown_channel_15m15-min channel cooldown.
F060filterfilt_cd_total_3m*NAcooldown_global_3mGlobal 3-min cooldown between any trades.
F061filterfilt_cd_after_loss_30m*NAcooldown_30m_after_loss_per_symbol30-min cooldown after loss per symbol.
F062filterfilt_cd_after_win_immediate*NAno_cooldown_after_winNo cooldown after win (ride momentum).
F063filterfilt_meta_marketcap_above_100m*NAmarket_cap_usd>=100e6Market cap > 100M.
F064filterfilt_meta_marketcap_above_1b*NAmarket_cap_usd>=1e9Market cap > 1B.
F065filterfilt_meta_marketcap_under_50m*NAmarket_cap_usd<=50e6Market cap < 50M (high beta).
F066filterfilt_meta_listed_age_under_30d*NAlisting_age_days<=30New listings only (high vol).
F067filterfilt_meta_btc_correlation_high*NAbtc_correlation_30d>=0.6High BTC-correlation.
F068filterfilt_meta_btc_correlation_low*NAbtc_correlation_30d<=0.3Low BTC-correlation (idiosyncratic).
F069filterfilt_meta_sector_meme*NAsector=memeMeme sector only.
F070filterfilt_meta_sector_defi*NAsector=defiDeFi sector only.
F071filterfilt_meta_sector_l1*NAsector=L1L1 sector only.
F072filterfilt_meta_blacklist_specific*NAsymbol_blacklistExclude specific problematic symbols.
F073filterfilt_tod_us_open*NAhour_utc in [13,15]US market open hours.
F074filterfilt_tod_us_close*NAhour_utc in [20,22]US market close hours.
F075filterfilt_tod_asian_open*NAhour_utc in [0,2]Asian market open.
F076filterfilt_tod_funding_window*NAnear_funding_settlementPre/during funding settlement.
F077filterfilt_tod_weekend*NAweekday in [Sat,Sun]Trade only on weekends (lower volume regime).
F078filterfilt_tod_high_vol_hours*NAhour_in_top_3_volHistorically high-vol hours.
F079filterfilt_tod_low_vol_hours*NAhour_in_bottom_3_volQuiet hours.
F080filterfilt_tod_avoid_news_window*NAnot_near_macro_eventAvoid Fed/CPI windows.
F081filterfilt_liq_top5*NAliquidity_rank_top5Symbol in top 5 by liquidity.
F082filterfilt_liq_quote_volume_high*NAquote_volume_above_p75Quote volume above p75.
F083filterfilt_liq_taker_volume_high*NAtaker_volume_above_p75Taker volume above p75.
F084filterfilt_liq_24h_change_volume_top*NA24h_volume_change_top24h volume change in top decile.
F085filterfilt_liq_oi_24h_change_top*NAoi_24h_change_topOI 24h change in top decile.
F086filterfilt_micro_book_imbalance_strong*NAbook_imbalance_strong_alignedOrder book imbalance strongly aligned with signal.
F087filterfilt_micro_book_imbalance_against*NAbook_imbalance_againstBook imbalance against signal (contrarian).
F088filterfilt_micro_aggressive_buys_5m*NAaggressive_buys_above_p75_5mAggressive buys above p75 in 5m.
F089filterfilt_micro_aggressive_sells_5m*NAaggressive_sells_above_p75_5mAggressive sells above p75 in 5m.
F090filterfilt_micro_taker_ratio_extreme_high*NAtaker_ratio_above_0.7Taker buy ratio above 0.7.
F091filterfilt_micro_taker_ratio_extreme_low*NAtaker_ratio_below_0.3Taker buy ratio below 0.3.
F092filterfilt_regime_btc_realized_vol_top*NAbtc_realized_vol_topBTC realized vol in top quartile.
F093filterfilt_regime_btc_realized_vol_bottom*NAbtc_realized_vol_bottomBTC realized vol in bottom quartile.
F094filterfilt_regime_eth_btc_dominance_change*NAeth_btc_dominance_changingETH/BTC dominance shifting.
F095filterfilt_regime_alt_dominance_change*NAalt_dominance_changeAlt dominance changing.
F096filterfilt_regime_funding_average_extreme*NAmarket_funding_avg_extremeMarket-wide funding average extreme.
F097filterfilt_pretrend_3m_pos_strong*NApretrend_3m_pct>=23m pretrend strongly positive.
F098filterfilt_pretrend_3m_neg_strong*NApretrend_3m_pct<=-23m pretrend strongly negative.
F099filterfilt_pretrend_15m_pos_strong*NApretrend_15m_pct>=515m pretrend strongly positive.
F100filterfilt_pretrend_15m_neg_strong*NApretrend_15m_pct<=-515m pretrend strongly negative.
F101filterfilt_pretrend_oi_5m_change*NAoi_change_5m_significantOI 5m change significant.
F102filterfilt_burst_first_in_30s*NAburst_first_in_30sFirst signal within 30s window.
F103filterfilt_burst_first_in_60s*NAburst_first_in_60sFirst signal within 60s window.
F104filterfilt_burst_density_high*NAburst_density>=3_in_60sHigh burst density (3+ in 60s).
F105filterfilt_cd_global_30s*NAcooldown_global_30sGlobal 30s cooldown between trades.
F106filterfilt_cd_global_2m*NAcooldown_global_2mGlobal 2-min cooldown.
F107filterfilt_cd_per_archetype_5m*NAcooldown_per_archetype_5mPer-archetype 5-min cooldown.
F108filterfilt_meta_volume_rank_top10*NAvolume_rank_top10Symbol in top 10 by volume.
F109filterfilt_meta_volume_rank_bottom10*NAvolume_rank_bottom10Symbol in bottom 10 by volume (test).
F110filterfilt_meta_oi_rank_top10*NAoi_rank_top10Symbol in top 10 by OI.
F111filterfilt_meta_funding_extreme_filter*NAfunding_extreme_historySymbol has history of extreme funding.
F112filterfilt_meta_recently_listed*NAlisting_age_days<=14Recently listed (<=14 days).
F113filterfilt_tod_funding_settlement_pre*NApre_funding_settlementPre funding settlement window.
F114filterfilt_tod_funding_settlement_post*NApost_funding_settlementPost funding settlement window.
F115filterfilt_tod_us_open_first_30m*NAus_open_first_30mFirst 30 min of US open.
F116filterfilt_tod_asian_close*NAasian_close_windowAsian session close window.
F117filterfilt_tod_macro_event_window*NAmacro_event_in_progressMacro event in progress window.
F118filterfilt_macro_no_fed_24h*NAno_fed_in_24hNo Fed event in 24h.
F119filterfilt_macro_no_cpi_24h*NAno_cpi_in_24hNo CPI release in 24h.
F120filterfilt_macro_post_macro_event_long*NApost_macro_event_15m15min after macro event (volatility relief).
R001riskrisk_size_fixed_5pctNANAsize=5pct_equityFixed 5% of equity per trade.
R002riskrisk_size_fixed_10pctNANAsize=10pct_equityFixed 10% (max from user spec).
R003riskrisk_size_fixed_7_5pctNANAsize=7.5pct_equityFixed 7.5% middle ground.
R004riskrisk_size_vol_adjustedNANAsize=inverse_volInverse-volatility sizing.
R005riskrisk_size_kelly_quarterNANAsize=0.25*kelly1/4 Kelly fraction.
R006riskrisk_size_kelly_halfNANAsize=0.5*kelly1/2 Kelly fraction.
R007riskrisk_size_atr_normalizedNANAsize_by_atrSize proportional to ATR.
R008riskrisk_size_pct_var_targetNANAtarget_var_1pctTarget 1% VaR per trade.
R009riskrisk_conc_max_1_positionNANAmax_open_positions=1Only 1 open position at a time.
R010riskrisk_conc_max_3_positionsNANAmax_open_positions=3Max 3 open positions.
R011riskrisk_conc_max_5_positionsNANAmax_open_positions=5Max 5 open positions.
R012riskrisk_conc_per_symbol_1NANAmax_per_symbol=1Max 1 per symbol.
R013riskrisk_conc_per_side_maxNANAmax_per_side=3Max 3 per side (limit lopsidedness).
R014riskrisk_conc_per_channel_maxNANAmax_per_channel=2Max 2 per channel source.
R015riskrisk_corr_no_pair_corr_above_0_7NANApair_corr<0.7Exclude correlated pairs > 0.7.
R016riskrisk_corr_max_3_per_sectorNANAmax_3_per_sectorMax 3 positions per sector.
R017riskrisk_corr_btc_exposure_capNANAbtc_beta_exposure_capCap BTC-correlated exposure.
R018riskrisk_corr_no_two_high_betaNANAmax_1_high_betaExclude double high-beta exposure.
R019riskrisk_corr_dynamic_pair_checkNANArealtime_corr_checkReal-time correlation check.
R020riskrisk_dl_loss_2pct_stopNANAdaily_loss_stop=2pctStop trading at 2% daily loss.
R021riskrisk_dl_loss_5pct_stopNANAdaily_loss_stop=5pctStop trading at 5% daily loss.
R022riskrisk_dl_max_10_tradesNANAmax_trades_per_day=10Max 10 trades/day.
R023riskrisk_dl_max_20_tradesNANAmax_trades_per_day=20Max 20 trades/day.
R024riskrisk_dl_pause_after_3_lossesNANApause_after_3_consec_lossPause after 3 consecutive losses.
R025riskrisk_div_force_symbol_rotationNANAforce_rotationMust rotate symbols (can't trade same twice).
R026riskrisk_div_avoid_recent_loserNANAskip_recent_loser_24hSkip symbols with recent 24h losses.
R027riskrisk_div_balance_long_shortNANAbalance_LS_ratioTry to balance L/S exposure.
R028riskrisk_div_sector_rotationNANAsector_rotationRotate sectors.
R029riskrisk_div_exposure_max_30pct_per_symbolNANAmax_pct_per_symbol=30Cap exposure per symbol.
R030riskrisk_div_geographic_diversificationNANAgeographic_diversificationAcross token regions (illusory but try).
R031riskrisk_size_dynamic_volatility_floorNANAsize_with_vol_floorDynamic sizing with minimum volatility floor.
R032riskrisk_size_capped_max_5pctNANAsize_capped_5pct_maxHard cap at 5% per trade regardless of signal strength.
R033riskrisk_conc_max_per_archetype_2NANAmax_per_archetype=2Max 2 open positions per archetype.
R034riskrisk_conc_max_per_strategy_3NANAmax_per_strategy=3Max 3 open positions per complete strategy.
R035riskrisk_dl_per_symbol_loss_2pctNANAper_symbol_loss_stop=2pctStop trading specific symbol after 2% daily loss in it.
R036riskrisk_dl_per_strategy_loss_3pctNANAper_strategy_loss_stop=3pctStop strategy after 3% daily loss.
R037riskrisk_div_pretrend_diversificationNANAdiversify_by_pretrendDiversify across pretrend regimes.
R038riskrisk_div_alternate_long_shortNANAalternate_LS_within_hourAlternate L/S within same hour for balance.
R039riskrisk_div_no_recent_winner_repeatNANAno_repeat_winning_symbol_30mNo repeat trading recent winner symbol within 30m.
R040riskrisk_div_session_diversificationNANAdiversify_across_sessionsDiversify trades across sessions.
C001cross_channelcc_pc_within_2m_oi*NApc_then_oi_within_2mPC + OI within 2-min window.
C002cross_channelcc_pc_within_5m_oi*NApc_then_oi_within_5mPC + OI within 5-min window.
C003cross_channelcc_pc_within_10m_oi*NApc_then_oi_within_10mPC + OI within 10-min window.
C004cross_channelcc_oi_within_2m_pc*NAoi_then_pc_within_2mOI then PC within 2-min.
C005cross_channelcc_oi_within_5m_pc*NAoi_then_pc_within_5mOI then PC within 5-min.
C006cross_channelcc_r6_within_2m_pc*NAr6_then_pc_within_2mR6 + PC within 2-min.
C007cross_channelcc_r6_within_5m_pc*NAr6_then_pc_within_5mR6 + PC within 5-min.
C008cross_channelcc_pc_oi_r6_5m_window*NAall_three_within_5mAll three channels in 5-min window.
C009cross_channelcc_pc_oi_funding_align*NApc_oi_funding_alignedPC + OI + funding sign aligned.
C010cross_channelcc_oi_taker_align*NAoi_signal_taker_alignedOI signal + taker flow aligned.
C011cross_channelcc_pc_oi_premium_align*NApc_oi_premium_alignedPC + OI + premium aligned.
C012cross_channelcc_full_chain_strong*NAmulti_signal_strong_confirmMulti-signal strong confirmation chain.
C013cross_channelcc_no_recent_opposite*NAno_opposite_signal_5mNo opposite signal within 5-min.
C014cross_channelcc_no_opposite_pc_3m*NAno_opposite_pc_3mNo opposite PC in 3-min.
C015cross_channelcc_no_opposite_oi_5m*NAno_opposite_oi_5mNo opposite OI in 5-min.
C016cross_channelcc_skip_after_r6_opposite*NAskip_if_r6_opposite_recentSkip if R6 opposite recently.
C017cross_channelcc_skip_recent_failed_loss*NAskip_if_recent_loss_symbolSkip if recent loss in this symbol.
C018cross_channelcc_no_extreme_funding_against*NAno_extreme_funding_againstSkip if funding against direction.
C019cross_channelcc_no_pretrend_extreme*NAno_pretrend_extremeSkip extreme pretrend setups.
C020cross_channelcc_btc_align_required*NAbtc_alignment_requiredRequire BTC alignment.
C021cross_channelcc_weight_pc_2x_oi*NApc_weight=2x_oiPC weighted 2x OI.
C022cross_channelcc_weight_oi_2x_pc*NAoi_weight=2x_pcOI weighted 2x PC.
C023cross_channelcc_weight_r6_3x*NAr6_weight=3xR6 highest weight.
C024cross_channelcc_weight_equal*NAequal_weightsEqual weights for all channels.
C025cross_channelcc_weight_recency*NArecent_signal_weighted_higherRecent signals weighted more.
C026cross_channelcc_weight_strength_proportional*NAweight_by_signal_strengthWeight by signal magnitude.
C027cross_channelcc_weight_volatility_inverse*NAinverse_volatility_weightedInverse-volatility weighted.
C028cross_channelcc_weight_liquidity_proportional*NAweight_by_liquidityWeight by liquidity.
C029cross_channelcc_weight_btc_align_boost*NAbtc_align_boost_2xBoost weight when BTC aligned.
C030cross_channelcc_weight_funding_align_boost*NAfunding_align_boostBoost when funding aligned.
C031cross_channelcc_decay_2m_half*NAhalf_life_2mSignal value halves after 2-min.
C032cross_channelcc_decay_5m_half*NAhalf_life_5m5-min half-life decay.
C033cross_channelcc_decay_10m_half*NAhalf_life_10m10-min half-life decay.
C034cross_channelcc_decay_linear_5m_zero*NAlinear_to_zero_5mLinear decay to zero in 5-min.
C035cross_channelcc_decay_linear_10m_zero*NAlinear_to_zero_10mLinear decay to zero in 10-min.
C036cross_channelcc_decay_step_2m*NAstep_decay_2mStep-decay every 2-min.
C037cross_channelcc_decay_exp_3m_tau*NAexp_decay_tau_3mExponential decay tau=3min.
C038cross_channelcc_decay_no_decay_15m*NAno_decay_15mNo decay within 15-min.
C039cross_channelcc_decay_immediate_post_event*NAimmediate_decayDecay starts immediately.
C040cross_channelcc_decay_post_first_minute*NAdecay_starts_after_60sDecay starts after first minute.
C041cross_channelcc_confirm_within_15s*NAconfirm_within_15sCross-channel confirmation within 15s.
C042cross_channelcc_confirm_within_30s*NAconfirm_within_30sCross-channel confirmation within 30s.
C043cross_channelcc_pc_oi_2nd_signal_within_5m*NApc_or_oi_2nd_signal_in_5mPC or OI second signal within 5m.
C044cross_channelcc_pc_pump_oi_pump_funding_align*NApc_oi_funding_aligned_pumpPC + OI pump + funding aligned (long bias).
C045cross_channelcc_pc_pump_oi_pump_funding_diverge_short*NApc_oi_funding_diverge_pumpPC + OI pump but funding against = short bias.
C046cross_channelcc_oi_then_pc_alignment_short*NAoi_pc_pretrend_misalignOI + PC against pretrend = short.
C047cross_channelcc_pc_oi_within_2m_strict*NApc_oi_within_2m_strict_alignPC + OI strict 2-min, side aligned.
C048cross_channelcc_pc_oi_within_2m_pretrend_align*NApc_oi_within_2m_pretrend_alignedPC + OI 2m + pretrend aligned.
C049cross_channelcc_three_channel_strong_strict_30s*NAthree_channel_strict_30sAll 3 channels in strict 30s window.
C050cross_channelcc_three_channel_pretrend_align_strict*NAthree_channel_pretrend_alignedAll 3 + pretrend strictly aligned.
C051cross_channelcc_no_recent_failure_signal*NAno_recent_failed_signal_5mNo recent failed signal in last 5m.
C052cross_channelcc_no_recent_failure_archetype*NAno_recent_failed_archetype_30mNo recent failed archetype within 30m.
C053cross_channelcc_no_recent_high_volatility*NAno_recent_high_vol_5mNo recent high volatility (pre-signal).
C054cross_channelcc_weight_recency_exponential*NArecency_exp_weightExponential decay weighting by signal recency.
C055cross_channelcc_weight_burst_count*NAweight_inverse_burstWeight inverse to burst count (favor first).
C056cross_channelcc_weight_archetype_history*NAweight_by_archetype_winrateWeight by archetype historical win rate.
C057cross_channelcc_weight_failure_history_inverse*NAweight_inverse_failure_rateWeight inverse to failure rate.
C058cross_channelcc_weight_combined_score*NAcombined_weighted_scoreCombined weighted score from all heuristics.
C059cross_channelcc_decay_15m*NAhalf_life_15m15-min half-life decay (slow).
C060cross_channelcc_decay_30m*NAhalf_life_30m30-min half-life decay (very slow).
